# Savery's of Broadway

> Luxury interior design studio rooted in the Cotswolds since 1991. Bespoke interiors, hand upholstery, premium fabrics, and expert design services.

## About

Savery's of Broadway is a luxury interior design studio established in 1991 by Lyndsey Savery. Based at the Cotswold Design Centre in Broadway, Worcestershire, the studio specialises in bespoke interior design, hand upholstery, premium fabric sourcing, custom furniture, rugs, and soft furnishings. The team brings over 50 years of combined expertise to residential and hospitality projects across the UK and internationally.

## Locations

- Broadway (HQ & Workshop): Cotswold Design Centre, Kennel Lane, Broadway, Worcestershire, WR12 7DJ — 01386 858 941
- Ludlow: 1 Tower Street, Ludlow, Shropshire, SY8 1RL — 01584 708 381
- Chelsea: Suite 9, 405 Kings Road, Chelsea, London, SW10 0BB — 020 3668 1000

## Services

- Full interior design (residential and hospitality)
- Hand upholstery (in-house workshop)
- Premium fabric and material sourcing
- Bespoke and custom furniture
- Rugs, soft furnishings, and accessories
- Curtain and blind making
